description: Longbridge official MCP — 110 tools for US/HK quotes, trading & portfolio analytics.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: com.longbridge/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Longbridge OpenAPI base URL. Used for OAuth metadata discovery.
environmentVariables.name: LONGBRIDGE_HTTP_URL

environmentVariables.description: Quote WebSocket endpoint used by the embedded Longbridge SDK.
environmentVariables.name: LONGBRIDGE_QUOTE_WS_URL

environmentVariables.description: Trade WebSocket endpoint used by the embedded Longbridge SDK.
environmentVariables.name: LONGBRIDGE_TRADE_WS_URL

runtimeArguments.description: HTTP bind address inside the container.
runtimeArguments.name: --bind

runtimeArguments.description: Externally reachable URL of the server. Required for public deployments; returned via OAuth protected resource metadata.
runtimeArguments.name: --base-url

headers.description: Longbridge OAuth 2.1 bearer token in the form `Bearer <access_token>`.
headers.name: Authorization
